description: NEXUS-6 망원경 렌즈 레지스트리 — 397 등록, 84 미구현 → 20종 구현

lenses.name: causal_chain

lenses.name: dice_bayesian

lenses.name: particle_higgs_coupling

lenses.name: control_pid_tuning

lenses.name: control_kalman_filter

lenses.name: fusion_powerplant_q_factor

lenses.name: cross_bio_chip

lenses.name: cross_ocean_network

lenses.name: cross_language_compiler

lenses.name: fermentation_kinetics

lenses.name: tidal_energy

lenses.name: acoustic_metamaterial

lenses.name: circadian_rhythm

lenses.name: volcano_eruption

lenses.name: coral_reef_ecology

lenses.name: origami_folding

lenses.name: earthquake_magnitude
